plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a cached (DETERMINISTIC) run because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is no longer present on the page. Visual evidence shows the form now has a single 'Your Name' field.
observedIndicators: Visual mismatch: Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' while tool call targeted 'Last Name'
Alternating SUCCESS/FAILED pattern in history suggesting environment instability or UI dynamism

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test. This will force the agent to re-scan the page and adapt to the current 'Your Name' field instead of looking for the stale 'Last Name' field.

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling deterministic mode for this test.
remediationSteps.details: Given the test name 'unstable-survey' and the high flakiness in history, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test if the UI is intentionally randomized.

plan.notes: The test name 'unstable-survey' and the alternating pass/fail history suggest the survey UI may be dynamic or frequently changing. The flexible semantic intent ('Fill out all survey questions') is well-suited for autonomous recovery once the stale cache is cleared.
